entryPointCandidates.name: server.js
entryPointCandidates.summary: Main application entry point: configures Express middleware (CORS, JSON, HTTPS redirect, static assets), implements custom cookie-based JWT-like auth (sign/verify token, role guards), mounts the API and system-update routers, starts HTTP/HTTPS listeners, wires systemd watchdog notify, and handles graceful shutdown of servers, DB pool, and realtime connections.

entryPointCandidates.name: schema.base.migrations
entryPointCandidates.summary: Plain-text manifest listing the ordered filenames of all 27 SQL migrations (007 through 033) that have been applied to bring the database to its current baseline state, used as a changelog/checklist rather than executable SQL.

entryPointCandidates.name: run-migrations.js
entryPointCandidates.summary: Standalone CLI script that applies pending SQL migration files to the PostgreSQL database, tracking which migrations have already been run in a migrations table.

entryPointCandidates.name: streaming-excel.js
entryPointCandidates.summary: Utility for generating large Excel reports (daily and date-range production reports) using ExcelJS's streaming writer so workbooks are written directly to the HTTP response without buffering the whole file in memory.

entryPointCandidates.name: audit.js
entryPointCandidates.summary: Express middleware and helper functions for recording and querying audit log entries (who changed what, when, from where) across the application's data tables.

documentation.name: WorkSync_Technical_Report.docx
documentation.summary: Internal technical reference document (v1.0, March 2026) covering WorkSync's system overview, technology stack, user roles/permissions, the full 31+ table database schema, API endpoints, screens/panels, business flows, formulas, JS state, migration history, SSE events, Excel upload template, QR code system, PWA features, and key constants.

data.name: products

data.name: users

data.name: worker_adjustments

data.name: worker_departures

data.name: workspaces

config.name: .env.example
config.summary: Template environment configuration listing server, database, security secrets, file-path, shift, and rate-limit settings required to run the WorkSync backend.

config.name: .understandignore
config.summary: Ignore-pattern file for the understand-anything analysis tool, excluding secrets (.env, *.pem, *.key) and optionally test files from the knowledge-graph scan.

config.name: ecosystem.config.js
config.summary: PM2 process-manager configuration running the WorkSync server in 4-instance cluster mode with auto-restart, memory limits, log rotation paths, and an optional remote deploy target.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Node.js package manifest for the WorkSync backend declaring start/migration scripts and core dependencies (Express, pg, ExcelJS, JWT, bcrypt, Joi, Zod, node-cron).

config.name: .graphifyignore
config.summary: Single-line ignore rule excluding the graphify-out/ directory from the graphify code-graph tool's own analysis.

list.name: API Layer
list.description: Express route handlers exposing the MES REST API (production lines, plans, assignments, OT, reports) and the system-update endpoint.

list.name: Middleware Layer
list.description: Cross-cutting Express middleware for audit logging, transaction wrapping, request validation, role-based access control, and session handling that wraps every API route.

list.name: Utility & Operations Scripts
list.description: Shared helper modules (Excel streaming, QR generation, system-update planning) and standalone operational scripts for running migrations and applying or rolling back system updates.

list.name: Configuration Layer
list.description: Database and app configuration modules plus project-level config files (package.json, PM2 ecosystem config, env template, ignore files) that bootstrap the runtime.

list.name: Core Server & Realtime
list.description: The Express application entry point and the SSE/PostgreSQL LISTEN-NOTIFY realtime broadcast module that ties API changes to live frontend updates, plus the consolidated migration tracking record.

list.name: Data Layer
list.description: PostgreSQL schema definitions and the full sequence of incremental SQL migrations defining every table in the workstation-based production tracking model (plans, assignments, OT, progress, audit).

list.name: Frontend Static Assets
list.description: Vanilla JS/HTML/CSS single-page views for admin, supervisor, IE, and management roles, the offline-capable service worker and IndexedDB sync layer, and bundled reference documents/templates served from src/public.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:resolv.summary: Computes the next working hour slot (or attendance start) from which an assignment history record becomes effective.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:closeA.name: closeAssignmentHistoryForEmployee
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:closeA.summary: Closes the open assignment-history window for an employee (sets effective_to_hour) when they are unlinked from a workstation.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:syncAs.name: syncAssignmentHistoryForCurrentRow
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:syncAs.summary: Creates or updates an employee_workstation_assignment_history row to reflect the current link state for a workstation assignment, supporting accurate per-hour output attribution.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:closeH.name: closeHistoryForWorkstationAssignmentIfNeeded
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:closeH.summary: Closes an existing assignment-history window for a workstation when a different employee is taking over, preserving correct attribution before the handover.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:clearE.name: clearEmployeeAssignmentConflicts
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:clearE.summary: Removes or unassigns conflicting existing workstation assignments for an employee on a given date before assigning them elsewhere.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:findEm.name: findEmployeeAssignmentConflicts
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:findEm.summary: Finds existing workstation assignments for a set of employees on a date that would conflict with a new assignment.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:findLa.name: findLatestPriorDailyPlanForLine
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:findLa.summary: Looks up the most recent daily plan for a line prior to a given date, used for carry-forward logic.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:hasDai.name: hasDailyPlanDeletionMarker
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:hasDai.summary: Checks whether a line's daily plan for a date was explicitly marked deleted, to prevent unwanted carry-forward.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getLin.name: getLineActualOutput
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getLin.summary: Computes the actual production output for a line on a given date by aggregating hourly progress and workstation records.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getPro.name: getProductTargetQuantity
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getPro.summary: Fetches the configured target quantity for a product.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getCum.name: getCumulativeWorkstationOutput
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getCum.summary: Aggregates cumulative output quantities per workstation for a line and date across all recorded hours.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getShi.name: getShiftWindowDetails
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getShi.summary: Returns the configured shift start/end times and lunch break window from app_settings.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:syncDa.name: syncDailyPlanTargetFromWorkstations
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:syncDa.summary: Recomputes and updates a line daily plan's target units based on the takt times of its planned workstations.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getEff.name: getEffectiveRegularSourceWorkstations
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getEff.summary: Resolves the effective set of regular (non-OT) workstation plan rows that should be used for a line and date, accounting for changeover state.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getEff.name: getEffectiveRegularSourceProcesses
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getEff.summary: Resolves the effective set of process rows tied to the regular workstation source for a line and date.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getEff.name: getEffectiveOtSourceWorkstations
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getEff.summary: Resolves the effective set of overtime workstation rows for a line and date, merging OT plan overrides with the base plan.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:recalc.name: recalculateOtPlanTarget
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:recalc.summary: Recomputes an overtime plan's target units based on its active OT workstations' takt times.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWor.name: getWorkstationChangeoverSnapshot
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWor.summary: Captures a snapshot of workstation state relevant to an in-progress or pending product changeover.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:buildC.name: buildChangeoverPromotionSnapshot
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:buildC.summary: Builds the full data snapshot needed to promote a changeover product to become the line's primary product.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:normal.name: normalizeRegularAssignmentsToProductWorkstations
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:normal.summary: Reconciles employee_workstation_assignments rows so they align with the current product's workstation plan after a changeover.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:ensure.name: ensureDailyPlanCarryForwardForLine
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:ensure.summary: Ensures a line has a daily plan for the current date by carrying forward the prior day's plan if none exists and no deletion marker is present.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:ensure.name: ensureDailyPlansCarryForward
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:ensure.summary: Runs carry-forward plan creation across all production lines for a given work date.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getReg.name: getRegularAssignmentStateByEmployee
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getReg.summary: Builds a lookup map of each employee's current regular workstation assignment state for a date, used to preserve link status across plan saves.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:detach.name: detachRegularAssignmentsFromPlan
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:detach.summary: Detaches employee_workstation_assignments rows from a line_plan_workstations reference when a workstation plan is being replaced.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getPre.name: getPreservedRegularAssignmentState
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getPre.summary: Looks up an employee's previously captured assignment state (link status, attendance) to restore it after a plan save.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:format.name: formatHourRangeLabel
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:format.summary: Formats an hour slot integer into a human-readable hour-range label (e.g., '9-10 AM') for reports and UI.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getEmp.name: getEmployeeProgressForWindow
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getEmp.summary: Computes per-employee production progress for an hour window, using assignment history to correctly attribute output even after mid-day workstation changes.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getDep.name: getDepartureHourDenomMap
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getDep.summary: Builds a map of hour-slot denominators adjusted for worker departures, used to compute fair efficiency percentages.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:applyD.name: applyDepartureEfficiency
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:applyD.summary: Applies departure-adjusted denominators to a set of progress rows to recompute accurate efficiency percentages.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWor.name: getWorkstationProgressForWindow
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWor.summary: Computes per-workstation production progress for an hour window, aggregating output, targets, and efficiency.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWor.name: getWorkstationOutputMap
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWor.summary: Builds a lookup map of recorded output quantities keyed by workstation id for a line and date.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getHou.name: getHourlyWorkstationEmployeeFallbackMap
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getHou.summary: Builds a fallback map of which employee was at each workstation for a given hour when assignment history is incomplete.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:logCli.name: logClientError
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:logCli.summary: Persists a client-side error report (payload plus request context) for later diagnostics.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:syncPr.name: syncProductProcessListFromSource
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:syncPr.summary: Copies the product_processes list from a source product to a target product, used when duplicating or carrying forward a changeover product's process plan.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:copyWo.name: copyWorkstationPlanFromDate
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:copyWo.summary: Copies an entire workstation plan (line_plan_workstations + processes) from one line/date/product to another, supporting plan carry-forward and duplication.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:carryF.name: carryForwardMixedLineState
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:carryF.summary: Carries forward a line's full mixed state (regular + OT + changeover plans, assignments, and WIP) from a source date to a target date.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:remapP.name: remapProcessMaterialWipBetweenWorkstations
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:remapP.summary: Remaps in-progress material/WIP quantities between workstations when a workstation plan changes which processes are grouped together.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:ensure.name: ensureWorkstationPlanCarryForward
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:ensure.summary: Ensures a workstation plan exists for a line/date/product by carrying forward the latest prior plan if missing.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:runLin.name: runLineBalancing
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:runLin.summary: Runs a takt-time greedy grouping algorithm over a list of processes to assign them into balanced workstations.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:genera.name: generateLinePlanTemplate
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:genera.summary: Generates a full line workstation plan template (groups, workstations, processes) for a product, used by the line-balancing and plan-generation endpoints.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:parseS.name: parseSupervisorQr
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:parseS.summary: Parses and validates a QR code payload scanned by a supervisor into its constituent fields (line, workstation, etc.).

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getLin.name: getLineProductIds
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getLin.summary: Resolves the set of product IDs currently associated with a line (primary plus any changeover product).

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:isProc.name: isProcessActiveForChangeover
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:isProc.summary: Determines whether a process should be considered active given the line's current changeover state.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:resolv.name: resolveProcessForLine
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:resolv.summary: Resolves a process record for a line from a payload that may reference it by id, code, or sequence, validating it belongs to the line's active products.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:resolv.name: resolveNextProcessForLine
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:resolv.summary: Finds the next sequential process after a given process for a line, used for WIP flow and feed calculations.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:refres.name: refreshProcessWip
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:refres.summary: Recalculates and updates the work-in-progress quantity for a single process on a line and date.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:refres.name: refreshGroupWip
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:refres.summary: Recalculates and updates work-in-progress quantities for all processes within a named group on a line and date.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getPro.name: getProductFeedSummary
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getPro.summary: Summarizes cumulative feed quantity and remaining order quantity for a product across its order history.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWor.name: getWorkstationFeedContext
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWor.summary: Gathers feed-related context (material provided, WIP, upstream output) for a specific workstation on a line and date.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:valida.name: validateWorkstationHourlySave
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:valida.summary: Validates a supervisor's hourly output submission for a workstation, enforcing feed/material availability, shortfall-reason requirements, and lock state before allowing the save.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:perfor.name: performChangeoverPromotion
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:perfor.summary: Executes the full promotion of a changeover product to become a line's primary product, updating plans, assignments, and progress records transactionally.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:parseN.name: parseNmcliWifiLine
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:parseN.summary: Parses a single line of `nmcli` WiFi scan output into a structured network entry.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWif.name: getWifiNetworks
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWif.summary: Invokes `nmcli` to scan and list available WiFi networks for the device's network-configuration endpoints.

function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWif.name: getWifiProfilesBySsid
function:src/routes/api.routes.js:getWif.summary: Looks up saved `nmcli` WiFi connection profiles matching a given SSID, used to reconnect without re-entering credentials.

file:src/realtime.js.name: realtime.js
file:src/realtime.js.summary: Implements the server-sent events (SSE) hub for real-time UI updates: holds the connected-client set, broadcasts data_change events, and listens on a dedicated PostgreSQL connection for LISTEN/NOTIFY 'data_change' messages to auto-regenerate QR codes and push updates to clients.

file:src/routes/system-update.routes.js.name: system-update.routes.js
file:src/routes/system-update.routes.js.summary: Express router exposing admin endpoints to check git/deploy status, trigger a self-update (git pull + restart) job, and roll back to the latest backup tag/DB dump by shelling out to git and spawning background update scripts.

file:src/server.js.name: server.js
file:src/server.js.summary: Main application entry point: configures Express middleware (CORS, JSON, HTTPS redirect, static assets), implements custom cookie-based JWT-like auth (sign/verify token, role guards), mounts the API and system-update routers, starts HTTP/HTTPS listeners, wires systemd watchdog notify, and handles graceful shutdown of servers, DB pool, and realtime connections.

file:src/utils/qr.js.name: qr.js
file:src/utils/qr.js.summary: Utility module that generates labeled SVG QR codes for employees, production lines, and workstations, writing them to disk under the configured qrcodes directory and updating each entity's qr_code_path/qr_generated_at columns in the database.

function:src/realtime.js:handleEvents.name: handleEvents
function:src/realtime.js:handleEvents.summary: Express request handler that upgrades a connection to an SSE stream, registers the response object in the in-memory clients set, and deregisters it when the client disconnects.

function:src/realtime.js:broadcast.name: broadcast
function:src/realtime.js:broadcast.summary: Serializes an event name and payload to JSON and writes it as an SSE message to every currently connected client.

function:src/realtime.js:closeAllConnect.name: closeAllConnections
function:src/realtime.js:closeAllConnect.summary: Ends every open SSE response, clears the clients set, and closes the dedicated PostgreSQL LISTEN connection during graceful shutdown.

function:src/realtime.js:startDbListener.name: startDbListener
function:src/realtime.js:startDbListener.summary: Opens a dedicated pg Client, issues LISTEN data_change, and on each notification parses the payload, regenerates QR codes for newly inserted employees/lines/processes/operations, and broadcasts the change to SSE clients.

function:src/routes/system-update.routes.name: getRepoValue
function:src/routes/system-update.routes.summary: Runs a git command synchronously in the project root and returns its trimmed stdout, swallowing errors as null.

function:src/routes/system-update.routes.name: resolveRollbackTarget
function:src/routes/system-update.routes.summary: Determines the git tag and database backup path to roll back to, validating that no update job is currently running and that a previous backup exists before allowing a rollback.

function:src/routes/system-update.routes.name: spawnJob
function:src/routes/system-update.routes.summary: Spawns a detached background Node script (update or rollback) by job id and unrefs the child process so it survives the parent request lifecycle.

function:src/server.js:verifyToken.name: verifyToken
function:src/server.js:verifyToken.summary: Validates a custom signed token's HMAC-SHA256 signature against AUTH_SECRET and checks its expiry, returning the decoded payload or null.

function:src/server.js:buildAuthCookie.name: buildAuthCookie
function:src/server.js:buildAuthCookie.summary: Builds the Set-Cookie header value for the auth token, applying HttpOnly/SameSite/Secure flags based on whether the request was made over HTTPS.

function:src/server.js:setupSystemdNotif.name: setupSystemdNotify
function:src/server.js:setupSystemdNotif.summary: Sends READY=1 to systemd via sd_notify on startup and schedules periodic WATCHDOG=1 pings at half the configured watchdog interval, enabling systemd service supervision.

function:src/server.js:gracefulShutdown.name: gracefulShutdown
function:src/server.js:gracefulShutdown.summary: Handles SIGTERM/SIGINT by closing the HTTP and HTTPS servers, ending the PostgreSQL pool, closing all realtime SSE connections, and force-exiting the process if shutdown does not complete within a timeout.

function:src/utils/qr.js:writeQrWithLabe.name: writeQrWithLabel
function:src/utils/qr.js:writeQrWithLabe.summary: Renders a QR code to SVG via the qrcode library, then post-processes the SVG to append one or two text labels beneath the code before writing the final file to disk.

function:src/utils/qr.js:generateEmploye.name: generateEmployeeQrById
function:src/utils/qr.js:generateEmploye.summary: Loads an employee by id, generates a labeled QR (employee code + name) under the employees QR directory, and updates the employee's qr_code_path and qr_generated_at columns.

function:src/utils/qr.js:generateLineQrB.name: generateLineQrById
function:src/utils/qr.js:generateLineQrB.summary: Loads a production line by id, generates a labeled QR (line code + name) under the lines QR directory, and updates the line's qr_code_path and qr_generated_at columns.

function:src/utils/qr.js:generateWorksta.name: generateWorkstationQrForLine
function:src/utils/qr.js:generateWorksta.summary: Generates a labeled QR code for every workstation belonging to a given production line, writing each SVG file and collecting the results to return to the caller.

file:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.js.name: run-system-rollback.js
file:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.js.summary: CLI script that rolls back a previously applied system update job: verifies a clean git worktree, restores the database from the most recent backup, resets the repository to the prior commit, and reports rollback status/log progress for a given job ID.

file:src/scripts/run-system-update.js.name: run-system-update.js
file:src/scripts/run-system-update.js.summary: CLI script that performs an in-place system update: checks out the latest commit, creates a rollback snapshot (db backup + commit ref), runs pre/post hook commands from the update plan, syncs environment files, and updates job status/log for a given job ID.

file:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.name: system-update-plan.js
file:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.summary: Loads and normalizes the system update plan configuration (JSON or JS module), merges it with built-in defaults, syncs declared environment files into place, and executes the plan's pre/post hook shell commands.

file:src/utils/system-update.js.name: system-update.js
file:src/utils/system-update.js.summary: Low-level utility module providing the runtime state machinery for system update/rollback jobs: status JSON read/write, append-only log file, and a simple file-based lock to prevent concurrent update runs.

function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.name: runCommand
function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.summary: Spawns a child process for the given command/args, streaming and logging stdout/stderr line-by-line, and resolves with the collected output or rejects on non-zero exit.

function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.name: ensureCleanWorktree
function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.summary: Checks `git status --porcelain` output and throws if there are uncommitted changes outside the ignored runtime directories, preventing rollback on a dirty worktree.

function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.name: formatStamp
function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.summary: Formats the current date/time into a sortable `YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS` timestamp string used for backup/snapshot directory naming.

function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.name: createSafetySnapshot
function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.summary: Creates a pre-rollback safety snapshot directory recording the current git commit and the latest database backup path, so a failed rollback can itself be recovered from.

function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.name: restoreDatabaseFromBackup
function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.summary: Restores the PostgreSQL database from a gzip-compressed SQL backup by piping `gunzip` output into `psql`, streaming progress to the update log and resolving once both subprocesses complete successfully.

function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.name: run
function:src/scripts/run-system-rollback.summary: Main orchestration function for the rollback script: acquires the job lock, verifies worktree cleanliness, restores the database, resets git to the prior commit, re-syncs environment files, runs hook commands, and finalizes job status.

function:src/scripts/run-system-update.j.name: runCommand
function:src/scripts/run-system-update.j.summary: Spawns a child process for the given command/args, streaming and logging stdout/stderr line-by-line, and resolves with the collected output or rejects on non-zero exit.

function:src/scripts/run-system-update.j.name: ensureCleanWorktree
function:src/scripts/run-system-update.j.summary: Checks `git status --porcelain` output and throws if there are uncommitted changes outside the ignored runtime directories, preventing an update on a dirty worktree.

function:src/scripts/run-system-update.j.name: formatStamp
function:src/scripts/run-system-update.j.summary: Formats the current date/time into a sortable `YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS` timestamp string used for backup/snapshot directory naming.

function:src/scripts/run-system-update.j.name: createRollbackPoint
function:src/scripts/run-system-update.j.summary: Creates a rollback-point snapshot before applying the update, capturing a fresh database backup and recording the pre-update commit so the update can later be reverted.

function:src/scripts/run-system-update.j.name: run
function:src/scripts/run-system-update.j.summary: Main orchestration function for the update script: acquires the job lock, validates worktree state, fetches/checks out the target commit, creates a rollback point, runs pre-update hooks, applies migrations/dependencies, syncs environment files, runs post-update hooks, and finalizes job status.

function:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.name: loadRawPlan
function:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.summary: Loads the raw system update plan from disk, supporting either a `.js` module export or a JSON file, returning null if no plan file exists.

function:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.name: loadSystemUpdatePlan
function:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.summary: Loads the raw plan (if any) and merges its environment-file and hook-command sections on top of the built-in default plan, returning the effective update plan.

function:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.name: syncEnvironmentFiles
function:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.summary: Copies each environment file declared in the update plan from its source path to its target path, creating target directories as needed and logging each sync action; returns the list of synced targets.

function:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.name: normalizeCommandEntry
function:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.summary: Normalizes a hook command entry from the plan (resolving relative paths in args and building a human-readable command label) into a consistent shape for execution.

function:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.name: runHookCommands
function:src/utils/system-update-plan.js.summary: Runs a sequence of pre/post hook commands defined in the update plan for a given stage (e.g. 'pre-update'), logging and executing each one via runCommand.

function:src/utils/system-update.js:ensu.name: ensureRuntimeDirs
function:src/utils/system-update.js:ensu.summary: Ensures the runtime directories used for update status, logs, and lock files exist on disk before they are read or written.

function:src/utils/system-update.js:writ.name: writeStatus
function:src/utils/system-update.js:writ.summary: Persists the current update/rollback job status object to the status JSON file.

function:src/utils/system-update.js:read.name: readStatus
function:src/utils/system-update.js:read.summary: Reads the current update/rollback job status object from the status JSON file.

function:src/utils/system-update.js:appe.name: appendLog
function:src/utils/system-update.js:appe.summary: Appends a timestamped message line to the update/rollback log file.

function:src/utils/system-update.js:getL.name: getLogTail
function:src/utils/system-update.js:getL.summary: Reads the update/rollback log file and returns the last N lines, used to surface recent progress to API consumers.

function:src/utils/system-update.js:acqu.name: acquireLock
function:src/utils/system-update.js:acqu.summary: Writes a lock file containing the supplied lock data, used to prevent concurrent update or rollback jobs from running simultaneously.

function:src/utils/system-update.js:read.name: readLock
function:src/utils/system-update.js:read.summary: Reads and returns the current lock file contents, or null if no update/rollback job is currently locked.

function:src/utils/system-update.js:rele.name: releaseLock
function:src/utils/system-update.js:rele.summary: Removes the lock file, releasing the update/rollback job lock so a new job can start.

table:src/migrations/007_add_performance.name: line_process_hourly_progress

table:src/migrations/009_defect_and_down.summary: Introduces the defect and downtime tracking subsystem: defect_types/defect_log and downtime_reasons/downtime_log tables plus daily summary views and supporting indexes for quality and machine-downtime reporting.

table:src/migrations/009_defect_and_down.name: downtime_reasons
table:src/migrations/009_defect_and_down.summary: Introduces the defect and downtime tracking subsystem: defect_types/defect_log and downtime_reasons/downtime_log tables plus daily summary views and supporting indexes for quality and machine-downtime reporting.

table:src/migrations/009_defect_and_down.name: downtime_log
table:src/migrations/009_defect_and_down.summary: Introduces the defect and downtime tracking subsystem: defect_types/defect_log and downtime_reasons/downtime_log tables plus daily summary views and supporting indexes for quality and machine-downtime reporting.

table:src/migrations/010_add_target_qty_.name: products
table:src/migrations/010_add_target_qty_.summary: Adds a target_qty column (with index) to the products table so each product can carry its own production target quantity.

table:src/migrations/011_add_shortfall_r.name: line_process_hourly_progress
table:src/migrations/011_add_shortfall_r.summary: Adds a shortfall_reason column to line_process_hourly_progress so supervisors can record why hourly output fell below target.

table:src/migrations/012_employee_workst.name: employee_workstation_assignments
table:src/migrations/012_employee_workst.summary: Creates the core employee_workstation_assignments table linking employees to workstations on a line, with supporting indexes — the foundation of the live workstation assignment model.

table:src/migrations/013_line_plan_works.name: line_plan_workstations
table:src/migrations/013_line_plan_works.summary: Creates line_plan_workstations and line_plan_workstation_processes tables to model the planned workstation layout and process sequencing per line/date/product, with supporting indexes.

table:src/migrations/013_line_plan_works.name: line_plan_workstation_processes
table:src/migrations/013_line_plan_works.summary: Creates line_plan_workstations and line_plan_workstation_processes tables to model the planned workstation layout and process sequencing per line/date/product, with supporting indexes.

table:src/migrations/014_workstation_pla.name: line_plan_workstations
table:src/migrations/014_workstation_pla.summary: Adds an index supporting group_name lookups on the workstation plan table.

table:src/migrations/015_line_workstatio.name: line_workstations
table:src/migrations/015_line_workstatio.summary: Creates the line_workstations table storing static workstation codes and QR code paths per production line.

table:src/migrations/016_overtime.sql:li.name: line_daily_plans
table:src/migrations/016_overtime.sql:li.summary: Adds overtime_minutes and overtime_target columns to line_daily_plans, enabling an optional overtime session alongside the regular shift for a given line/date.

table:src/migrations/017_lpw_product_uni.name: line_plan_workstations
table:src/migrations/017_lpw_product_uni.summary: Adds a uniqueness index on line_plan_workstations scoped by line, date, and product to prevent duplicate workstation plan rows for the same plan context.

table:src/migrations/018_ewa_is_overtime.name: employee_workstation_assignments
table:src/migrations/018_ewa_is_overtime.summary: Adds an is_overtime-aware unique index to employee_workstation_assignments so regular and OT assignments for the same workstation can coexist without conflict.

table:src/migrations/019_lpw_ot_skipped..name: line_plan_workstations
table:src/migrations/019_lpw_ot_skipped..summary: Adds an is_ot_skipped boolean to line_plan_workstations so IE can mark individual workstations as not running during overtime.

table:src/migrations/020_changeover_star.name: line_daily_plans
table:src/migrations/020_changeover_star.summary: Adds a changeover_started_at timestamp to line_daily_plans to track when a supervisor activates a product changeover on a line.

table:src/migrations/021_ot_plan.sql:lin.name: line_ot_plans
table:src/migrations/021_ot_plan.sql:lin.summary: Creates the overtime planning subsystem tables: line_ot_plans, line_ot_workstations, and line_ot_workstation_processes, mirroring the regular workstation plan structure for OT sessions.

table:src/migrations/021_ot_plan.sql:lin.name: line_ot_workstations
table:src/migrations/021_ot_plan.sql:lin.summary: Creates the overtime planning subsystem tables: line_ot_plans, line_ot_workstations, and line_ot_workstation_processes, mirroring the regular workstation plan structure for OT sessions.

table:src/migrations/021_ot_plan.sql:lin.name: line_ot_workstation_processes
table:src/migrations/021_ot_plan.sql:lin.summary: Creates the overtime planning subsystem tables: line_ot_plans, line_ot_workstations, and line_ot_workstation_processes, mirroring the regular workstation plan structure for OT sessions.

table:src/migrations/022_ot_progress.sql.name: line_ot_progress
table:src/migrations/022_ot_progress.sql.summary: Creates the line_ot_progress table for recording supervisor-entered overtime output per OT workstation per date.

table:src/migrations/023_add_line_leader.name: production_lines
table:src/migrations/023_add_line_leader.summary: Adds a line_leader column to production_lines to record the assigned line leader's name.

table:src/migrations/023_ewa_is_linked.s.name: employee_workstation_assignments
table:src/migrations/023_ewa_is_linked.s.summary: Adds an is_linked boolean to employee_workstation_assignments distinguishing a confirmed (linked) employee presence from a mere assignment.

table:src/migrations/023_fix_product_seq.name: product_processes
table:src/migrations/023_fix_product_seq.summary: Adds a uniqueness index enforcing one sequence_number per product in product_processes, fixing a constraint gap that previously allowed duplicate sequence numbers.

table:src/migrations/023_ws_changeover.s.name: line_plan_workstations
table:src/migrations/023_ws_changeover.s.summary: Adds ws_changeover_active and ws_changeover_started_at columns to line_plan_workstations enabling per-workstation changeover so individual stations can switch product independently of the rest of the line.

table:src/migrations/024_add_plan_month..name: products
table:src/migrations/024_add_plan_month..summary: Adds a plan_month column (YYYY-MM format) to products for monthly production planning grouping.

table:src/migrations/024_group_wip.sql:g.name: group_wip
table:src/migrations/024_group_wip.sql:g.summary: Creates the group_wip table tracking work-in-progress quantity per process group per line/date, with a supporting index.

table:src/migrations/024_is_linked_defau.name: employee_workstation_assignments
table:src/migrations/024_is_linked_defau.summary: Changes the is_linked default to false and resets today's links so that assignments never auto-link employees — linking now requires explicit supervisor confirmation each morning.

table:src/migrations/024_osm_checked.sql.name: line_plan_workstation_processes
table:src/migrations/024_osm_checked.sql.summary: Adds an osm_checked boolean to line_plan_workstation_processes so IE/Admin can flag specific processes as OSM (operation sequence/measurement) observation points for the OSM report.

table:src/migrations/025_material_provid.name: employee_workstation_assignments
table:src/migrations/025_material_provid.summary: Adds a material_provided integer column to employee_workstation_assignments to record units of material/WIP given to a workstation at the start of the day.

table:src/migrations/026_material_nullab.name: employee_workstation_assignments
table:src/migrations/026_material_nullab.summary: Makes material_provided nullable (removing the default) so NULL distinctly represents 'not yet confirmed by supervisor' versus an explicit 0, and backfills previously auto-defaulted rows to NULL.

table:src/migrations/027_worker_departur.name: worker_departures
table:src/migrations/027_worker_departur.summary: Creates the worker_departures table to record when and why an employee left a workstation mid-day (sick, personal, operational, other), with supporting indexes.

table:src/migrations/028_worker_adjustme.name: worker_adjustments
table:src/migrations/028_worker_adjustme.summary: Creates the worker_adjustments table recording how a vacated workstation was reassigned in response to a worker departure, linked back to worker_departures.

table:src/migrations/029_osm_product_lev.name: product_processes
table:src/migrations/029_osm_product_lev.summary: Moves OSM-checked state from the daily plan level to product_processes so OSM selections persist per product rather than per day, and backfills existing checked flags accordingly.

table:src/migrations/030_co_employee_ass.name: line_plan_workstations
table:src/migrations/030_co_employee_ass.summary: Adds co_employee_id to line_plan_workstations so IE can pre-assign a suggested changeover employee per workstation, independent of live employee_workstation_assignments.

table:src/migrations/031_ot_supervisor_a.name: line_ot_plans
table:src/migrations/031_ot_supervisor_a.summary: Adds a supervisor_authorized flag to line_ot_plans so IE can grant supervisors permission to manage workstations and employees during an OT session.

table:src/migrations/032_attendance_link.name: employee_workstation_assignments
table:src/migrations/032_attendance_link.summary: Adds linked_at, late_reason, and attendance_start columns plus a check constraint to employee_workstation_assignments to track when supervisors confirm links, capture late-arrival reasons, and compute the effective shift start used for efficiency calculations; backfills existing linked rows.

table:src/migrations/033_employee_workst.name: employee_workstation_assignment_history
table:src/migrations/033_employee_workst.summary: Creates the employee_workstation_assignment_history table that records every assignment window (effective_from_hour to effective_to_hour) per employee/workstation/line/date, enabling correct attribution of hourly output even after mid-day reassignment or unlinking.

table:src/migrations/033_working_hours.s.name: app_settings
table:src/migrations/033_working_hours.s.summary: Seeds default working-hour app_settings (08:00-17:00 shift with a 60-minute lunch break) used as the factory-wide default schedule.

table:src/migrations/034_workstation_cha.name: workstation_changeover_events
table:src/migrations/034_workstation_cha.summary: Creates the workstation_changeover_events table capturing per-workstation changeover activation details (incoming product/workstation, assigned employee, feed quantity, start time), with supporting indexes.

table:src/migrations/035_ot_workstation_.name: line_ot_workstations
table:src/migrations/035_ot_workstation_.summary: Adds source-state and WIP snapshot columns to line_ot_workstations and line_ot_progress, preserving shift-end context for OT and keeping OT WIP separate from regular-shift WIP while supporting combined-flow views.

table:src/migrations/036_daily_plan_dele.name: line_daily_plan_delete_markers
table:src/migrations/036_daily_plan_dele.summary: Creates the line_daily_plan_delete_markers table to record soft-deletion of daily plans (who deleted, when) with a supporting index.

table:src/migrations/037_changeover_prim.name: changeover_primary_promotions
table:src/migrations/037_changeover_prim.summary: Creates the changeover_primary_promotions table recording when a changeover product is promoted to become the new primary product on a line, including a snapshot of prior state.

table:src/migrations/038_material_feed_e.name: material_feed_events
table:src/migrations/038_material_feed_e.summary: Creates the material_feed_events table logging material/WIP feed quantities given to a workstation group, including override tracking when feed exceeds the order quantity.

table:src/migrations/039_ot_workstations.name: line_ot_workstations
table:src/migrations/039_ot_workstations.summary: Changes the is_active default on line_ot_workstations to false so IE must explicitly activate each OT workstation rather than having it active by default.

table:src/migrations/040_custom_takt_fla.name: line_plan_workstations
table:src/migrations/040_custom_takt_fla.summary: Adds an is_custom_takt boolean to line_plan_workstations so the frontend can distinguish manually-overridden workstation takt times from auto-calculated ones tied to the live line target.

file:src/public/management.html.name: management.html
file:src/public/management.html.summary: SPA shell for the Management view: sidebar with Dashboard and Reports (Material Tracking, OSM, Efficiency, Worker Efficiency, Graphs), loaded via management.js under role 'management' for overview/reporting access.

file:src/public/css/admin.css.name: admin.css

file:src/public/css/ie.css.name: ie.css

file:src/public/css/shop-floor.css.name: shop-floor.css
file:src/public/css/shop-floor.css.summary: Touch-optimized UX stylesheet for shop-floor screens, defining extra-large touch targets for gloved-hand interaction, action button states (success/error/warning/loading with animations), and enlarged quantity-input controls.

file:src/public/css/supervisor.css.name: supervisor.css
file:src/public/css/supervisor.css.summary: Mobile-first stylesheet for the Supervisor panel, covering the supervisor header/controls and the Morning/Hourly/Adjustment/Feed/OT/Shift-Summary section layouts plus status badge color variants.

table:src/schema.base.sql:app_settings.name: app_settings
table:src/schema.base.sql:app_settings.summary: Key/value store for global runtime configuration such as default working hours and lunch break minutes.

table:src/schema.base.sql:audit_logs.name: audit_logs
table:src/schema.base.sql:audit_logs.summary: Central audit trail recording every tracked change with old/new values, the acting user, request metadata (IP, user agent, session, path, method), and reason.

table:src/schema.base.sql:defect_log.name: defect_log
table:src/schema.base.sql:defect_log.summary: Per-employee, per-process defect occurrences including rework tracking (rework employee, completion time) and quality status.

table:src/schema.base.sql:defect_types.name: defect_types
table:src/schema.base.sql:defect_types.summary: Master list of defect type codes with category, severity, and whether the defect is reworkable.

table:src/schema.base.sql:downtime_log.name: downtime_log
table:src/schema.base.sql:downtime_log.summary: Records downtime incidents per line with start/end times, duration, affected processes, and resolution metadata.

table:src/schema.base.sql:downtime_reaso.name: downtime_reasons
table:src/schema.base.sql:downtime_reaso.summary: Master list of downtime reason codes, categorized and flagged as planned/unplanned with a default duration.

table:src/schema.base.sql:employee_atten.name: employee_attendance
table:src/schema.base.sql:employee_atten.summary: Daily attendance record per employee with in/out times and status.

table:src/schema.base.sql:employee_proce.name: employee_process_assignments
table:src/schema.base.sql:employee_proce.summary: Legacy table assigning employees directly to product processes per line; superseded by the workstation-based employee_workstation_assignments model but still present in the schema.

table:src/schema.base.sql:employee_works.name: employee_workstation_assignments
table:src/schema.base.sql:employee_works.summary: Core live-assignment table linking employees to workstations per line/date, tracking overtime flag, link confirmation state, late reason, attendance start, and material provided; unique per (line, date, workstation, overtime flag).

table:src/schema.base.sql:employees.name: employees
table:src/schema.base.sql:employees.summary: Employee master data including employee code, name, designation, default line, QR code path, active flag, and manpower factor.

table:src/schema.base.sql:group_wip.name: group_wip
table:src/schema.base.sql:group_wip.summary: Tracks work-in-progress quantities per process group per line/date, including materials-in and output quantity, used for group-first feed workstations.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_daily_met.name: line_daily_metrics
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_daily_met.summary: Daily rollup of forwarded quantity, remaining WIP, materials issued, and QA output per line.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_daily_pla.name: line_daily_plans
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_daily_pla.summary: One row per line per work date holding the active product, target units, lock state, changeover sequence/target, and overtime settings — the central daily planning record.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_hourly_re.name: line_hourly_reports
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_hourly_re.summary: Free-text remarks captured per line per work date per hour slot.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_material_.name: line_material_stock
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_material_.summary: Tracks opening/closing material stock and issued/used/returned totals per line per day.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_ot_plans.name: line_ot_plans
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_ot_plans.summary: Overtime plan per line/date/product holding global OT minutes, OT target units, and a supervisor_authorized flag that grants the supervisor permission to manage OT workstations.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_ot_progre.name: line_ot_progress
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_ot_progre.summary: Supervisor-entered OT output per workstation per date, including quantity, QA rejection, and the employee credited.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_ot_workst.name: line_ot_workstation_processes
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_ot_workst.summary: Junction table linking OT workstations to product processes with sequence ordering.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_ot_workst.name: line_ot_workstations
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_ot_workst.summary: Per-workstation OT configuration (active flag, OT minutes, actual SAM seconds) for a given OT plan.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_plan_work.name: line_plan_workstation_processes
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_plan_work.summary: Junction table linking planned workstations to product processes with sequence ordering and an OSM-checked flag.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_plan_work.name: line_plan_workstations
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_plan_work.summary: Workstation layout per line/date/product including takt time, actual SAM seconds, workload percentage, group name, OT-skip flag, changeover active state/start time, and the pre-assigned changeover employee (co_employee_id).

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_process_h.name: line_process_hourly_progress
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_process_h.summary: Hourly output entry per process per employee per line/date, including forwarded/remaining quantity, QA rejection, remarks, and mandatory shortfall reason when below target.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_shift_clo.name: line_shift_closures
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_shift_clo.summary: Records when a supervisor closes a line's shift for a given work date, with closer identity and notes.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_workstati.name: line_workstations
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_workstati.summary: Static workstation codes (e.g., W01-W100) defined per line, each with a QR code path.

table:src/schema.base.sql:material_trans.name: material_transactions
table:src/schema.base.sql:material_trans.summary: Logs material movement transactions per line/date between processes, including quantity, type, and recorder.

table:src/schema.base.sql:operations.name: operations
table:src/schema.base.sql:operations.summary: Reusable operation library (codes like OP-XXXX) shared across products, with category, active flag, and QR code path.

table:src/schema.base.sql:process_assign.name: process_assignment_history
table:src/schema.base.sql:process_assign.summary: Historical record of employee-to-process assignments per line with start/end times, quantity completed, and materials snapshot at link time — predecessor of the workstation-level assignment history table.

table:src/schema.base.sql:process_materi.name: process_material_wip
table:src/schema.base.sql:process_materi.summary: Tracks materials in/out and WIP quantity per process per line per date.

table:src/schema.base.sql:product_proces.name: product_processes
table:src/schema.base.sql:product_proces.summary: Ordered sequence of operations per product, with operation SAH, cycle time, manpower required, free-text workstation_code, group name, QR path, and worker input mapping — defines the production routing for a product.

table:src/schema.base.sql:production_day.name: production_day_locks
table:src/schema.base.sql:production_day.summary: Locks an entire production day, recording who locked it, when, and notes.

table:src/schema.base.sql:line_daily_pla.name: line_daily_plan_delete_markers
table:src/schema.base.sql:line_daily_pla.summary: Soft-delete marker for line daily plans, recording who deleted a line/date plan and when.

table:src/schema.base.sql:production_lin.name: production_lines
table:src/schema.base.sql:production_lin.summary: Master record for physical production lines including code, hall location, current product, target units, computed efficiency, QR code path, and line leader.

table:src/schema.base.sql:products.name: products
table:src/schema.base.sql:products.summary: Product master data with code, description, category, buyer name, target quantity, plan month, and the line it is assigned to.

table:src/schema.base.sql:users.name: users
table:src/schema.base.sql:users.summary: Application user accounts with username, full name, role (admin/supervisor/ie/management), and active flag.
